title: CLI: Approval Status Display
description: Adds approval status to hlx tickets get and list commands

steps.title: TicketDetail type: add approvalStatus
steps.description: Added approvalStatus: string | null to TicketDetail type, placed after mergeQueueStatus.

steps.title: Display: Approval line in get output
steps.description: Added conditional display of 'Approval:' line, following the exact same pattern as mergeQueueStatus.

steps.title: TicketItem type: add approvalStatus
steps.description: Added approvalStatus: string | null to TicketItem type.

steps.title: Display: approval tag in list output
steps.description: Appends [PENDING], [APPROVED], or [NEEDS_DEFENSE] tag to the end of each list line when approvalStatus is present.
